title: moraea marginata
intro: Moraea marginata, also known as the Red Hill Moraea or Yellow Corn Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Moraea marginata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Moraea marginata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
